paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 5.9 as of 2026-07-17, with a change of -0.59% from the prior close and -31.93% over the last 21 sessions.

There have been 4 new news items in the last 24 hours, with recent headlines discussing the company's governance concerns, a $375 million convertibles deal, and the resignation of director designee Miles Everson. News sources include simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms detailing the issuance of convertible senior notes and the resignation of director Miles Everson, as well as a SCHEDULE 13D/A and a DFAN14A form. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
